text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy hamlet, there lived a curious cat named Whiskers. He had green eyes like emeralds and whiskers so long they could tickle birds off their nests. Whiskers loved to explore the woods behind his house. He especially liked the old, gnarly oak tree where he'd listen to the birds at night.

One particular evening, as stars danced in a velvet sky, Whiskers stumbled upon a small clearing. In the center stood an enormous apple tree. The tree was barely loaded except for one particularly lovely-looking apple hanging low. Drawn by an invisible siren song, Whiskers leapt up and caught the apple.

Back at home, Whiskers regaled his human, Lily, with tales of a mystical apple. Lily promised to bake something tasting exactly like it next evening. Delighted, Whiskers dozed in anticipation.

The next evening, the apple tasted like honey combined with fresh spring grass. It
